$comment: Per-segment normalization rules. Each entry: file_a_strip and file_b_strip remove byte ranges before alignment; exclude_positions removes byte ranges from both files before hashing. Ranges are [start, end) Python-style. Phase 1 uses these position-based rules; Phase 2 adds field-based rules in addition.

CL01.$comment: CL01 layout: PUBL  ABC. (11) + timestamp YYYYMMDD (8) + ' I' (2) + 39 spaces. Exclude the timestamp so two records that differ only by date still compare as matches.

ENDS.$comment: ENDS carries a 3-byte ASCII segment count after the header. The count is reconstructible from the record and is not a data field, so exclude it from comparison.
